info.name: Postman Get tags for an entity

params.name: entityType
params.description: The type of entity to manage tags for.

items.docs: Gets all tags associated with a specific entity (API, collection, or workspace).

info.name: Postman Update tags for an entity

params.name: entityType
params.description: The type of entity to manage tags for.

items.docs: Updates (replaces) the tags associated with a specific entity. This replaces all existing tags with the provided list. To add tags without removing existing ones, first GET the current tags and include them in the update.
